params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: ★★★ Fresh HAR ground-truth for dashboard.cohere.com chat playground. Previous batch (#888) returned FAIL — envelope schema iteration blocked. Required: (1) Login: user is already logged into Cohere dashboard on test PC profile (if session expired, skip and report error_AUTH_REQUIRED). (2) Navigate to chat playground (/playground/chat). (3) Submit PII prompt → capture FULL streaming response. (4) Target identification — V2 streaming schema: type discriminant field name + delta.message.content.text shape (or whatever the current path is). (5) Whether response uses SSE (text/event-stream) or chunked-JSON or NDJSON — capture raw response chunks (first 5–10) including headers. (6) zod schema parseOrThrow path on the frontend — note which field appears mandatory (look at request initiator stack if visible). Output: HAR + raw SSE/stream chunks + identified type discriminant + content path at results/{id}/.

notes: HAR capture for cohere V2 streaming schema (type discriminant + delta path) — unblocks Phase 6 cohere iteration.
